content: new timeline info!
horlas side story is between ch4 and ch5
mouchette is confirmed to be arc2

Wait, i thought Arc 2 keeper is same person with arc 1 keeper? 

(picture just for how sweet Mouchette is)
i think the "keeper" in that scene is the part of keeper that is still trapped behind the gate and didnt get sent to arc2
or a keeper from another world (since ch9 confirmed that multiple parallel identical timelines exist)
its likely the part that was left behind when Gdoll brough us into arc 2 world
but it is interesting to see that multiple versions of keeper lore tangent is still semi relavent
less of gdoll and more of gramona id say. gdoll only "captured" keepers signal
gramona was the one that set it free
true

i thought the mouchette event was taking place at some point in the arc 2 world? or are there details that prove it isn't the same world that arc 2 takes place in? (i still haven't started arc 2 yet but i wanted to do the mouchette event story anyways because it's disconnected enough i wouldn't really get spoiled or anything)
the latest story unlock confirmed its arc2
just that a certain scene in it raised our current discussion of multiple keeper fragments

oh right, i see now
sorry, missed a bit of reading comprehension there oops
makes sense though, re: discussing keeper fragments
Glad to see Keeper with more varied awakeners keep them company during investigation
It makes it more interesting personally
Yeah, i think this too
Arc 1 keeper knows that another universe keeper is weak and sent some awakener

i think an interesting factor of that scene is keeper being described by "scent", which isnt something a normal person normally says
id guess that this "keeper" is the part that is actively suppressing tohu with the aeon authorities and is a bit less human than our keeper
~~aka GKeeper~~
When will we get gkeeper as a unit
Using your god self as a unit

honestly i can only ship keeper with ramona if the keeper is leonora. for whatever reason sylvester/ramona doesn't work for me. i can easily imagine sylvester and ramona as queerplatonic or just ride-or-die besties or pure familial or whatever but i just can't imagine sylvester and ramona specifically being romantic.
leonora, however? leonora and ramona are in lesbians thank you goodnight.

the keeper just feels very gay to me. give all the prettyboys to sylvester, let leonora have all the women. that is my ramble for today. (you may yell at me for my opinions if you wish but please be nice about it if you do)
I ship keeper with all of them
Harem is a option
I think I prefer alot more of keeper interactions as leonora in general
keeper is very girly pop
so sylvester might come across as a doormat
nods nods
honestly half the time sylvester is transmasc to me. sometimes in my silly headcanons he's trans and sometimes he's cis. schrodinger's gender i guess
eldritch gods do not need to follow human rules for gender or whatever
what difference does it make really? Sylvester and Leonora have identical experiences anyway? or is the gender role the key factor here?
they’re 2 types of bottom
pants
girlypop and twinklyslop

Hello, somewhat new to the game, can y'all explain what exactly went on in the opening scene? The silver key ceremony thing? All I know is that things went from 0-100 fast and were there other survivors?
there were survivors like Ogier, ramona and the keeper. Dissolution emerged and attacked everyone around the ceremony/ the Silver Key ceremony selects a Keeper every once
Arc 2 ch3 was really cool
Loved Doresain
Doorstain
I have problem with Doresain leg
Slay
Clemetine leg equivelant

Try to cosplay challenge: impossible
Amputate ur best friend

Bug spray
Selects a keeper? So only one keeper gets the silver key every (time frame)?
you can ask Niko more about it.
There are many silver keys, though only one keeper at a time, I believe. Investigators also have a key, just not one marked with a K

And regarding the opening scene, if I recall correctly: the pool beneath mythag became unstable and stopped preventing dissolution from affecting the area where the ceremony was held, the dissolution creatures started slaughtering everyone, which in turn caused Lotan to go insane due to the investigator she was previously linked to dying, severing the connection awakeners need for mental stability
Unless stated otherwise, I'm pretty sure there were more survivors, just also a lot of death
Please do correct me if I'm wrong about any of that Niko, hard to keep track about everything happening in the story xD
Aight ty for clearing everything up
Huh really unique. They talk to us
there can be more than one keeper at a time, just that the requirements for being one are much higher than investigators, hence why theres so few of them
Ah right, Alistair is a keeper too, right?
all mythag awakeners are linked to the black pool. lotan didnt have an extra human linker at the time which is why she went mad
yep Alistair is the first keeper
and the exact reason the black pool unstablalised during the prologue was because tawil physically manifested, which meant she wasnt paying attention to it
note: tawil has only physically manifested 3 times in history, with the prologue being the 3rd time

I recall Ogier was fighting lotan at the start before we linked up, been a while so I don't recall if anything was mentioned about him also starting to experience loss of control or if he was linked to someone else before
And thanks for the corrections, it's nice having someone so versed in the lore of the game <:LeoLove:1226868916484178000>
tbh its never stated outright either, so there's no confirmation
but i think its reasonable enough to guess that most investigators will maintain one link even on campus
if anything william is the weird one for not having a partner
and id assume ogier is easy to maintain his link since hes usually assigned to new investigators
Yeah I did find it odd too, though i suppose the key still is very useful even without an awakener
most certainly, the key can be used for more than just linking, such as closing d-rifts
Maybe he just didn't do well when it comes to connecting with awakeners?
cant be, since one of the requirements for being an investigator is being able to link with 1 awakener
Keepers talk about how Ramona and William were so much better than them ended at the time when first awkaener class started
which means william is a loner
Guess that makes sense
Maybe he just didn't like the tradeoff in life force
if you read his archive profile hes a *bit* traumatized
he used to stay in research till his senior died on duty
and only then did he start doing fieldwork
Seems like the guy can't escape trauma || no matter which dimension ||
Has there been any mention if the keys help protect against dissolution?
nope
pretty sure they dont on account of all the keepers being forgotten
yeah investigators are not expected to be remembered
hence the gravestone carving
and even then doll said if you die from dissolution the engraved name will vanish anyway
Oh yeah, i was thinking if they can protect to a certain point but obviously not make immune
Or is it as soon as you get dissolution on you, it's over?
nope, the risk is the same as everyone else
How it spreads is also unclear, right?
such is the nature of a substance whos very nature erases proof of its existence
seems like after a certain degree, its essentially irreversible
Yup hollowing you out from the inside... not a nice way to go
though im not sure if there any degree where the erasure is not permanent
dissolution resistance seems to be an innate quality of certain lucky people
and awakeners
Awakeners come back slightly different though
I recall the conversation about either Aigis or Jenkins mentioned that
well first off there the entire deal with "not being entirely made of flesh anymore"
Yeahhh
Are the bodies for them shaped by the awakener or just fully made by the person doing the awakening?
secondly the most important part of an awakener is their silver core, so in theory as long as that is intact they would be fine
shaped by the awakener during awakening. mythag has an appendix of common materials
(no the players do not have access to this list)
Seems like death of an awakener has an impact on the silver core though, since Sorel was said to get weaker from the second awakening
(But that story was mtl, so not sure how much is actually meant exactly the way it's said)
it’s best if you don’t dwell on it too much since they haven’t explained a lot of things and never gave a clue or a hint to what it could be
well, treat destruction of the body as a fatal injury. there's no guarantee you can come back from it alive, and even if you did, you would not be in peak condition anymore
I thirst for lore, hard not to dwell on the snippets they give 😭
meanwhile destruction of the silver core is more akin to a "true death", so that ones permanent

yeah I used to wonder a lot
but then I realized they just never thought of it
at some parts of the game  explaining the lore is closer to writing really good headcanons
even the timeline milestones are contradicting
your favorite time traveller ward
also we never see the real proof of awakeners being weaker if awaken for the 2nd time
its just in theory... well take dolls word for it i guess
But when the lore fits in, God, it's so good. Like in Miryam sidestory where she turned the person who awoke her into a fishman, which would still keep the link
shes the expert not me
and the powerscaling is better not brought in bc a lot of things doesn’t make sense
when you say it like that.... huh that makes sense
i will beat powerscalers out of this channel
well i guess fishmen can maintain links
i wonder why i never thought of that

you can't beat me

I'm stronger
youre not a powerscaler
yet
I was thinking back to the mention how asylum patients were great linker material, makes sense that creatures who barely do more than those would work well for low maintenance
thats still one of the funnier lore tidbits
wdym mentally ill people make for better linkers
ramona what do you meannnn
or arc 2 just discard linker
Gonna guess it's just a matter of them being so constrained that they got no exertion to lessen life energy

linker is for loser

so the theory that GTulu is the true linker of everything in arc 2 world
somehow

bc a lot of plot points that are in need of being addressed
this one we know actually, its the previous bishop. (alive but not in the best health)
Ah that's nice then
Guess unless we hear differently, it applies to act 2 Salv too
caecus as well? hes not even considered lemurian bros one of the unknowns
Guess we can just consider a random cultist or so to have linked with Caecus before
They certainly had enough manpower, I suppose
yeah but not in arc 2
I remember Miryam used her blood to do sth with Goliath
goli yes but not caec
probably the reason why he’s a Lemumu now
It was some Lemurian spell against Blasphemy or defiance if i recall. It wwas tatted on one area of the body and was triggerable
Goliath begging to be made into an awakener, instantly trying to kill the person who did it and when it fails telling her "alright, lemme work under you again" was so great
Funny as well to think if he somehow managed to kill Miryam, he'd have just destroyed himself
goli be like: nah im built different
Goliath had it on his neck and if he dared to defy, Miryam would simply trigger it and in the cases he tried to fight back
But our 9'5 big boi (Or something in that range) is built different
can’t believe he became a Lemurian bc Miryam put a blood curse on him lol
guess the secret to meta is blood transplants
Bro was build a hater. The second he saw Tulu and realises who he is, he let's ud go cause Miryam's reaction would be hillarious
Still wish we got a little extra story about how Miryam and Goliath joined  Mythag
This was never explained anywhere?
mhm
Lol, that's kind of hillarious
tease in their first story in profile
but never say much
Especially with Miryam changing attitude from what she was in Chapter 6 to now acting like a Jehovah Witness
she technically has a big change of mind
Seeing her interact with Tulu on Mythag grounds would have been a great way to explain that shift a bit
murder does a lot to change the mind~
Tulu is still here
means the divine realm will come back
one day
so no point acting crazy
Trust
Mythag also allows her time to reflect on herself
i think she realized that proselytizing is a faster way to make the divine realm happen than ritual murder cult
so she went legit
I did like the end of her sidestory conversation, where she said that she would do everything all over again
Still herself, just a bit more mellow now
so.... juli but tolerable

mhm
but when the situation called for sacrifice a child she will gladly do it again
based
Goliath is probably the simplest explanation, dude saw we beat Miryam and the god inside murphy so obviously we're a better bet to follow for power
Caro at the heart
juli but she gets arrested if she tries something
so she has no choice but to play nice
except that one time during frenzy
Murphys situation must suck, imagine if the twins had to go to school with juli even after escaping
we don't talk about what happened on frenzy night

embeds.title: Niko's Event Unlock Recommendations
embeds.description: Since the in-game side story list is not in chronological order, this is a spoiler-free list of side stories I recommend to those interested in the lore of Morimens to read and in what order.  This list is also a spoiler-free companion list to my (spoiler full) Morimens timeline project, where I ...
